creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gian-Simon Purkert from comment #2)

The links you shared are unrelated.

I'm using iocage from package builders on 13.2 without issues, so I suspect something went from while updating using portmaster. I haven't used portmaster in about ten years, so I'm not sure if it has all features that pkg upgrade would give you. E.g., if you came from py38-iocage, it's possible that some dependencies didn't get updated properly.

A way to fix your issue *could* be to:

    pkg delete py39-iocage
    pkg autoremove
    cd /usr/ports/sysutils/iocage
    make clean
    make install clean

On each step check that what pkg will do is ok before answering (y)es.
